nasb.text: Even though Elnathan and Delaiah and Gemariah pleaded with the king not to burn the scroll, he would not listen to them.

esv.text: Even when Elnathan and Delaiah and Gemariah urged the king not to burn the scroll, he would not listen to them.

cnv.text: 雖然以利拿單、第萊雅和基瑪利雅懇求王不要燒這書卷，王卻不聽他們，

ccb.text: 虽然以利拿单、第莱雅和基玛利雅恳求王不要把卷轴烧掉，王却不听，
